title: nageia nagi
intro: Nageia nagi, also known as the Pinang or Borneo Pinang, is a species of coniferous tree native to the tropical rainforests of Borneo. Traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine, the plant's resin has been shown to possess medicinal properties, including antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Nageia nagi include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its use as a treatment for skin conditions and wounds. The resin of the plant is often prepared in herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
